title: The Haunted House
body: Just outside Saltmarsh stands an old manor house with a reputation for strange happenings — lights in darkened windows, sounds with no source, locals who won't go near it after dusk. Thalion has taken a personal interest in investigating the cause. Whether the haunting is real, manufactured, or something stranger entirely remains to be seen.

title: Return Book for Reward: Tides of the Azure
body:
For the return of one missing book: The Tides of the Azure: A Sailor's Almanac and Ledger of Strange Waters
Bound in cracked blue leather, stamped with a silver wave-mark. Last believed to be in the possession of Old Rellan Hark, lately of the docks.
Book may be returned to Favance Zire, scribe and copyist, presently lodging near the Wicker Goat.
